introduce.title: What This AI Brow Tint Generator Does
introduce.label: How It Works
introduce.description: The AI Brow Tint Generator is a free virtual try-on tool. Upload one photo, then preview brow tint shades, brow lamination styles, and tinted brow gel colors on your own face — before you spend a cent at the salon. The AI analyzes your brow shape, skin tone, and natural color to deliver photorealistic results in under 15 seconds.

image.alt: AI Brow Tint Generator How It Works

items.title: Upload Once, Try Unlimited
items.description: Upload your photo a single time and try as many brow tint shades, lamination styles, or tinted gel looks as your credits allow. No re-uploading needed.

items.title: Photorealistic AI Results
items.description: GPT Image 2 blends each brow tint shade with your natural brow shape, skin tone, and lighting for results brow artists worldwide use as consultation references.

items.title: 200+ Curated Styles
items.description: Browse pre-tuned brow tint styles by category — natural, bold, brow lamination, lash and brow tint — or describe your own custom shade in the prompt box.

items.title: Download in HD
items.description: Export your brow tint before and after image in high resolution. Bring it to your brow artist or salon to communicate exactly what you want.

tools.title: One Generator. Every Brow Tinting Style.
tools.description: Each style below uses the same AI generator with parameters tuned for that specific look. Browse the gallery below to try any of them on your own photo.

items.title: Brow Lamination Simulator
items.description: Preview the brushed-up, fluffy laminated brow look — with or without tint. Ideal for first-time lamination clients deciding on shape before committing to the salon treatment.

items.title: Tinted Brow Gel Try-On
items.description: See how 12+ tinted brow gel shades — from soft taupe to deep espresso — sit on your natural brows. Match the gel before you buy a single tube.

items.title: Henna Brow Color Match
items.description: Henna brow tint is warmer and longer-lasting than traditional dye. Preview the rust, mahogany, and chestnut shades commonly used by henna brow artists.

items.title: Lash and Brow Tint Preview
items.description: Preview combined lash + brow tint styles for a complete eye-framing look. See how dark lashes balance your tinted brows in a single image.

items.title: Brow Code Tint Visualizer
items.description: Browse the Brow Code tint shade range and visualize each formula on your face shape and skin tone. Compare formulas side by side before booking.

items.title: Professional Brow Tint Preview
items.description: Salon-quality before-and-after generation suitable for sharing with your brow artist. The reference image speaks louder than any verbal description.

usage.title: How to Use the AI Brow Tint Generator
usage.description: Get a realistic brow tint preview in four simple steps. No signup required for the free trial.

image.alt: AI Brow Tint Generator Usage Steps

items.title: Upload a Clear Front-Facing Photo
items.description: Use a well-lit photo with your eyebrows clearly visible. Avoid sunglasses, hats, hair covering your brows, or side angles. The AI maps your brow shape from this single image.

image.alt: Upload Photo for Brow Tint Preview

items.title: Choose Your Brow Tint Style
items.description: Pick from 200+ curated styles across natural tints, bold tints, brow lamination, and lash + brow tint combinations — or describe your own shade in the prompt box.

items.title: Generate Your Preview
items.description: The AI processes your photo in 8–15 seconds and returns a photorealistic preview of your brows in the chosen tint, lamination, or gel style.

items.title: Download and Share
items.description: Save the high-res preview to your device. Share it with your brow artist before your appointment — or post it on social media for friends' reactions before booking.

faq.title: AI Brow Tint Generator FAQ
faq.description: Technical questions about photo requirements, credits, accuracy, and downloads.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team

items.question: How long does each generation take?
items.answer: Most brow tint previews finish in 8–15 seconds depending on image size and server load. Pro tier generations are prioritized and typically complete in under 10 seconds.

items.question: What photo gives the best result?
items.answer: A front-facing, well-lit photo with eyebrows clearly visible. Avoid sunglasses, hair over brows, side angles, low light, and cartoon images. A neutral expression works best for accurate brow shape mapping.

items.question: What file formats can I upload and download?
items.answer: Upload JPG or PNG up to 10MB. Download as PNG (standard) or HD PNG (paid tiers). Original photo aspect ratio is preserved unless you crop with the built-in tool.

items.question: How many credits does each generation cost?
items.answer: Standard generations cost 1 credit each. HD generations cost 2 credits. Free trial includes a starter credit allocation. Paid plans include monthly credits plus rollover.

items.question: Can I generate multiple shades from one photo?
items.answer: Yes. Upload once, then generate as many shades or styles as your credits allow without re-uploading. The AI re-uses your photo for every preview in the session.

items.question: What is the maximum resolution?
items.answer: Free tier: up to 1024×1024. Starter: up to 1536×1536. Pro: up to 2048×2048 with HD download enabled.

items.question: Are uploaded photos stored or used for training?
items.answer: No. Photos are processed securely and deleted automatically after generation. We never share, sell, or train AI models on uploaded photos.

items.question: What's the difference between the brow lamination simulator and the brow tint generator?
items.answer: Same generator, different style presets. The lamination simulator focuses on brushed-up brow shape; the tint generator focuses on color. Both can be combined in a single generation by selecting brow lamination + tint styles.

items.question: Can I preview a custom shade not in the gallery?
items.answer: Pro tier supports custom shade input via the prompt box (e.g., describe a specific Pantone color or shade name). Free and Starter tiers use the curated 200+ shade library.

items.question: Does it work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes. The AI brow tint generator runs entirely in your browser — phone, tablet, or desktop. No app to install. No signup required for the free trial.

items.question: What if my generated preview looks unrealistic?
items.answer: First, try a higher-quality photo with better lighting and a clearer view of your eyebrows. If results still seem off, switch to a different style preset — some shades render more accurately on certain skin tones. Pro support can investigate specific cases.

items.question: Can I use the generated image commercially?
items.answer: Personal use is unrestricted. Commercial use (salon marketing, paid social media ads, magazine editorial) requires a Pro plan license. The Pro plan grants commercial rights for all generations during the active subscription period.

photoGuidelines.title: Photo Guidelines for Best Results
photoGuidelines.suitableDescription: Please upload a clear, front-facing photo of your face with your eyebrows clearly visible. Avoid covering your brows with hair or accessories.
photoGuidelines.unsuitableDescription: Please don't upload photos taken from the side, in low light, or where your eyebrows are covered by hair, sunglasses, or any other objects. Also, please avoid cartoon images.
